inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the component.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Defines whether the component is in disabled state.

*Note:** A disabled component is completely noninteractive.

inputs.name: headerText
inputs.description: Defines the headerText of the item.

inputs.name: icon
inputs.description: Defines the icon of the component.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Indicates whether a loading indicator should be shown.

inputs.name: loadingReason
inputs.description: Indicates why the control is in loading state.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Defines the text of the user settings item.

inputs.name: tooltip
inputs.description:
Defines the tooltip of the component.

A tooltip attribute should be provided to represent the meaning or function when the component is collapsed and only the icon is visible.

outputs.name: ui5SelectionChange
outputs.description: Fired when a selected view changed.
